---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, command, recipe, or AI tool integration
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

A short description of the integration pain point or recurring question.

## Proposed addition

What should the skill produce? Where should the content live?

- [ ] New troubleshooting recipe (`references/troubleshooting/`)
- [ ] New platform-specific guidance (`references/<platform>/`)
- [ ] New slash command (`commands/`)
- [ ] New AI tool integration (`configs/<tool>/` + `install.sh`)
- [ ] Other:

## Example interaction

```
You: ...
AI: ...
```

## Why this matters

Who benefits and how (e.g. "every team integrating Huawei IAP hits this", "current `/purchasely:review` misses X").
